title: 「Another 句」
titleEn: Using another to add one more person, thing or idea
formula: Subject + verb + another + singular countable noun + other information

formulas.formula: Subject + verb + another + singular countable noun + other information

example: Limited natural resources are another reason why we should live a green life.
exampleZh: 自然資源有限，是我們應該實踐綠色生活的另一個原因。

examples.en: Limited natural resources are another reason why we should live a green life.
examples.zh: 自然資源有限，是我們應該實踐綠色生活的另一個原因。
examples.highlight: another reason why we should live a green life

meaning.zh: Another 表示同一類別中另一個或額外一個人物、事物、原因、方法或想法。

rules.en: Another is followed by a singular countable noun.
rules.zh: Another 後面通常接單數可數名詞。

rules.en: Do not put a or an before another.
rules.zh: Another 前面不需要再加 a 或 an。

rules.en: Another means one more member of the same category.
rules.zh: Another 表示同一類別中再多一個。

rules.en: Do not use another directly before a regular plural or uncountable noun.
rules.zh: 不可直接用 another 修飾一般複數名詞或不可數名詞。

rules.en: Another, the other and one another have different meanings.
rules.zh: Another、the other 和 one another 意思不同。

rules.en: When an another-phrase is the subject, use a singular verb.
rules.zh: Another 名詞詞組作主語時，動詞通常使用單數形式。
examples: Another reason is the high cost.

benefits.en: It helps you add one more related idea clearly.
benefits.zh: 它能清楚加入同一類別中的另一項相關資料。

benefits.en: It helps you develop speaking and writing.
benefits.zh: 它方便你繼續發展原因、例子、好處或解決方法。

benefits.en: It gives you an alternative to repeatedly using also.
benefits.zh: 它可代替反覆使用 also，令句式更有變化。

benefits.en: It helps organise a list of related points.
benefits.zh: Another reason、another benefit 等表達能預示接下來的資料類別。

benefits.en: It makes explanations shorter and more direct.
benefits.zh: 它能以更自然、直接的方式表達「再多一個」。

en: Rewrite each sentence using another + singular countable noun to introduce one more person, thing, reason, way, example, benefit, problem or idea.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 another＋單數可數名詞改寫以下句子，以表達另一個人物、事物、原因、方法、例子、好處、問題或想法。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: This book gives us one more example of a brave young person.

questions.answer: This book gives us another example of a brave young person.
questions.answerZh: 這本書為我們提供了另一個勇敢年輕人的例子。

questions.prompt: The speaker used one more point to support her opinion about online classes: they save travel time.
questions.promptZh: 講者提出了另一個論點支持她對網上課堂的看法：網上課堂能節省交通時間。
questions.answer: Saving travel time is another point that supports the speaker’s opinion about online classes.

questions.prompt: The old bridge is dangerous because its surface becomes slippery in wet weather. Poor lighting creates an additional danger.
questions.promptZh: 舊橋在潮濕天氣下會因橋面濕滑而變得危險，而照明不足則帶來另一項危險。
questions.answer: Besides the danger caused by its slippery surface in wet weather, poor lighting is another danger on the old bridge.
questions.answerZh: 除了潮濕天氣下濕滑橋面造成的危險外，照明不足是舊橋上的另一項危險。
questions.highlight: Besides the danger caused by its slippery surface in wet weather, poor lighting is another danger on the old bridge.

questions.prompt: Many parents choose the school because it has experienced teachers. Its strong music programme gives them one more reason.

questions.prompt: The company can cut costs by reducing packaging, and it can also cut costs by planning delivery routes more carefully.
questions.promptZh: 公司可以透過減少包裝降低成本，亦可以透過更仔細地規劃送貨路線降低成本。

questions.answerZh: 除了減少包裝外，更仔細地規劃送貨路線是公司降低成本的另一種方法。
questions.highlight: Besides reducing packaging, planning delivery routes more carefully is another way for the company to cut costs.

questions.prompt: The public library lends books. It offers an additional service by lending tablets.
questions.promptZh: 公共圖書館借出書籍，亦透過借出平板電腦提供另一項服務。
questions.answer: Besides lending books, lending tablets is another service provided by the public library.
questions.answerZh: 除了借出書籍外，借出平板電腦是公共圖書館提供的另一項服務。
questions.highlight: Besides lending books, lending tablets is another service provided by the public library.

questions.prompt: Unclear roles caused the team to lose time. A slow approval process caused an additional delay.
questions.promptZh: 職責不清令團隊浪費時間，而緩慢的審批程序則造成另一項延誤。
questions.answer: A slow approval process was another reason why the team lost time.
questions.answerZh: 緩慢的審批程序是團隊浪費時間的另一個原因。
questions.highlight: A slow approval process was another reason why the team lost time.

questions.prompt: Students can build vocabulary by reading. They can also build it by watching English videos.
questions.promptZh: 學生可以透過閱讀增加詞彙量，亦可以透過觀看英語影片增加詞彙量。
questions.answer: Besides reading, watching English videos is another way for students to build their vocabulary.
questions.answerZh: 除了閱讀外，觀看英語影片是學生增加詞彙量的另一種方法。
questions.highlight: Besides reading, watching English videos is another way for students to build their vocabulary.

questions.prompt: Cities should plant more trees because they provide shade. They also help reduce air pollution.
questions.promptZh: 城市應該種植更多樹木，因為樹木可以提供遮蔭，亦有助減少空氣污染。
questions.answer: In addition to providing shade, trees help reduce air pollution, which is another reason why cities should plant more of them.
questions.answerZh: 除了提供遮蔭外，樹木亦有助減少空氣污染，這是城市應該種植更多樹木的另一個原因。
questions.highlight: In addition to providing shade, trees help reduce air pollution, which is another reason why cities should plant more of them.

questions.prompt: Patients can book appointments by phone. The clinic plans to offer an additional method through a mobile app.
questions.promptZh: 病人可以透過電話預約，而診所計劃透過手機應用程式提供另一種預約方法。
questions.answer: A mobile app will be another way for patients to book appointments at the clinic.
questions.answerZh: 手機應用程式將會是病人在診所預約的另一種方法。
questions.highlight: A mobile app will be another way for patients to book appointments at the clinic.

questions.prompt: The policy may reduce waste. It may have one more benefit: it may encourage people to think more carefully before buying disposable products.
questions.promptZh: 這項政策可能減少廢物。它亦可能帶來另一項好處：鼓勵人們購買即棄產品前更仔細考慮。
questions.answer: Another possible benefit of the policy is that it may encourage people to think more carefully before buying disposable products.
questions.answerZh: 這項政策另一項可能的好處，是它或會鼓勵人們購買即棄產品前更仔細考慮。
questions.highlight: Another possible benefit of the policy is that it may encourage people to think more carefully before buying disposable products.

questions.prompt: The community centre already runs an exercise class for older residents. It is planning an extra programme that teaches basic computer skills.
questions.promptZh: 社區中心已經為年長居民舉辦運動班，現正計劃增設一個教授基本電腦技能的課程。
questions.answer: Besides its exercise class, the community centre is planning to add another programme for older residents: a basic computer skills course.
questions.answerZh: 除了運動班外，社區中心正計劃為年長居民增設另一個課程：基本電腦技能課程。
questions.highlight: Besides its exercise class, the community centre is planning to add another programme for older residents: a basic computer skills course.

questions.prompt: The government can improve road safety by enforcing speed limits. Better street lighting offers one more approach, especially near schools.
questions.promptZh: 政府可以透過執行車速限制改善道路安全，而更完善的街道照明則提供另一種方法，尤其適用於學校附近。
questions.answer: Besides enforcing speed limits, better street lighting is another way for the government to improve road safety, especially near schools.
questions.answerZh: 除了執行車速限制外，更完善的街道照明是政府改善道路安全的另一種方法，尤其適用於學校附近。
questions.highlight: Besides enforcing speed limits, better street lighting is another way for the government to improve road safety, especially near schools.
